title: v2.12.2
body:
**Hotfix release — eliminate folder conversation bleed into main list**

- New folder conversations now eagerly write `hidden: true` + `folderId` to `conversation_meta` at thread creation time, before streaming begins. Previously there was a window during the first stream where the conversation could appear in the main chat list.

title: v2.12.1
body:
**Hotfix release — folder conversation listing rewrite**

- **Folder-native listing** — Folder conversation lists now enumerate `thread_mapping` memories directly from the folder's Backboard assistant instead of filtering by a `folderId` tag. Conversations appear immediately upon creation, not only after title generation completes.
- **Main list suppression** — Conversations in folders are hidden from the main chat list via a `hidden` flag, ensuring clean separation.
- **Move to folder (create/copy/hide)** — Moving a conversation into a folder writes a `thread_mapping` on the folder's assistant pointing at the existing Backboard thread (no messages copied, no tokens consumed) and marks the conversation hidden in the main list. Moving out reverses both steps.
- **Multi-folder move** — Moving a conversation from one folder to another correctly removes the old `thread_mapping` before writing the new one.

title: v2.12.0
body:
# Nash v2.12.0

**Folder isolation and memory management**

- **Folder isolation** — Each new folder gets its own dedicated Backboard assistant. Conversations inside a folder use that assistant's thread and context, fully isolated from the main chat and from other folders. Default in the create-folder modal is now isolated.
- **Folder memory import** — Import button on the folder landing page opens the same two-step ChatGPT export flow as the global memories drawer, but writes memories directly into the folder's assistant.
- **Folder memory browser** — Brain icon button opens a searchable modal listing all memories stored in the folder assistant, with per-item delete (two-tap confirm).
- **gen_title fix** — Title generation now correctly resolves threads for folder conversations after a server restart by falling back to the folder's assistant thread mappings.
- **Folder UI polish** — Folder landing page title clears the header bar (pt-20), footer version/slot-machine text matches landing page position.

title: v2.11.1
body:
**Hotfix release**

- Fix slot machine footer text clipping on wider phrases by sizing container to the widest rendered phrase.
- Increase court canvas rotation to 70–90° for a more abstract, less diagram-like background.

title: v2.11.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **Slot machine footer tagline:** The static "Every AI for Everyone." footer text now cycles through rotating phrases with a smooth drop-in animation matching the greeting text style.
- **Ambient basketball court canvas:** The landing page background features a subliminal, massively-scaled half-court line drawing that breathes with a slow opacity pulse. Slightly different angle each page load.
- New `CourtCanvas` and `SlotMachineText` components.

title: v2.10.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **User management redesign:** Rebuilt the admin user management panel into a full-width two-column split-pane layout. User list on the left with avatar initials, role badges, and instant selection; detail panel on the right with plan selector, token usage progress bar, and inline save confirmations.
- **Promo codes tab:** Moved promo code creation and management into a dedicated tab so it no longer competes with the user list for vertical space.
- **Micro-interactions:** Added skeleton loading states, colored gradient avatars, animated save confirmations, and active-state button press feedback throughout the admin panel.

title: v2.9.5
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Persona marketplace:** Add delete icon on each persona card in the model list (Personas / marketplace grid). Icon shows on hover on desktop and is always visible on mobile; confirm dialog before delete.
- **Builder footer:** Move delete button next to the Save button in the builder so it is easy to find when editing a persona.

title: v2.9.4
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Persona list/edit for users:** Fix "Persona Not Available" for non-admin users. The effective-permissions endpoint now returns the shape the client expects (`permissionBits`) and grants full permission for the user's own personas from their config assistant, so users can list and edit their own personas in the build panel.

title: v2.9.3
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Messages after persona/tool use:** Fix blank chat with spinner after a persona finishes. Backboard returns messages with role='tool'; the SDK Thread model only allowed user/assistant/system. We now fetch thread messages via raw JSON and normalize tool→assistant so GET /api/messages works.
- **Personas:** Add delete persona from the list (hover on desktop, always visible on mobile) and delete icon in builder header when a persona is selected.

title: v2.9.2
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Clean console logs:** Upgrade `@ariakit/react` to 0.4.22 and remove the obsolete `setValueOnChange` prop from `MCPServerMenuItem` to eliminate a React DOM prop warning on every page load.

title: v2.9.1
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Billing pricing:** Fix Plus plan price display from $29.99 to $19.99 CAD on all billing screens.
- **Downgrade flow:** Users on the Unlimited plan can now click a Downgrade button on the Free and Plus cards, which opens the Stripe customer portal to complete the plan change.

title: v2.9.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **MCP server integration:** Add, delete, and use MCP servers in chat. Tools are fetched on creation, registered on the Backboard assistant, and called via a REQUIRES_ACTION tool loop. Tool names are prefixed with the server name so the model knows which server each tool belongs to.
- **MCP persistence:** MCP server configs survive page reload via the `/api/init` response.
- **MCP hover delete:** Hover over any MCP server card in the settings panel to reveal a delete button for quick removal and re-registration.
- **Share links:** Fix public share lookup (GET) and deletion (DELETE) by moving share records to the global system assistant with per-user metadata tagging.
- **Billing portal:** Auto-create a Stripe customer for users with manually granted plans so the billing portal always opens correctly.
- **Auth:** Mark the refresh-token cookie as `secure=True` in the Google OAuth callback.

title: v2.8.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **Thread forking:** Fork any conversation at any message — choose visible path, branches, or all-messages-to-target. Duplicate conversations in one click.
- **Memory toggle labels:** Fix memory mode toggle so label always reflects the active state correctly.
- **Persona creation:** Fix persona builder so new personas save and appear without requiring a page refresh.
- **File uploads:** Reliability improvements to file attachment handling in the chat input.

title: v2.7.2
body:
**Bugfix release**

- **Mobile folder navigation:** Selecting a folder now closes the sidebar and switches to the chat view, matching the behavior of selecting a thread.
- **Model search stability:** Fix a crash when searching models if an assistants endpoint has no assistants loaded yet (null-safe property access).
- **Persona chat on mobile:** Tapping "Start Chat" on a persona now closes the sidebar so the chat view is visible immediately.

title: v2.7.1
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **App Runner workers:** Restore Gunicorn to 2 workers in the Docker production image so App Runner health checks and concurrent connections work correctly.

title: v2.7.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **Smooth streaming:** Replaced the queue/background-thread streaming architecture with a direct pull-based pipeline (`iter_async`), eliminating an entire class of buffering and timing bugs.
- **Progressive text reveal:** New client-side `useProgressiveText` hook reveals assistant responses at a steady visual pace (~640 chars/sec) regardless of how bursty the upstream delivery is, so text flows in smoothly instead of appearing in a single dump.
- **Resume race condition fix:** Prevent duplicate `generate()` calls when the client reconnects to a still-active stream, fixing the double-header / HTTP 400 / chat-reset bug.
- **Smoke test:** New `smoke-chat-stream-cadence.sh` script with timestamped SSE cadence analysis, direct Backboard comparison, and resume reconnect assertions.

title: v2.6.1
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **New-chat completion stability:** Stop newly created chats from falling back into stale resume state after the server assigns a real conversation ID.
- **Stream lifecycle fix:** Keep resume-on-load from reattaching to a just-finished run when the route changes from `/c/new` to the real conversation, which prevented replies from settling and hid the thread until reload.
- **Sidebar consistency:** Ensure completed chats are reflected in the conversations list immediately instead of waiting for a full page refresh.

title: v2.6.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **Responsive billing and settings navigation:** Move billing and settings into dedicated routes, extract a shared billing content view, improve mobile account-menu navigation, and tighten the pricing experience across desktop and small screens.
- **Model selector tiers:** Add list-wide `Free`, `Fast`, and `Powerful` filters above the provider-grouped model picker, backed by explicit tier metadata in the model config payload.
- **Chat stability and polish:** Retry aborted silent auth refreshes, improve final conversation/message handling in SSE completion paths, and surface the app version in mobile navigation.

title: v2.5.5
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Login screen recovery:** Stop the auth refresh flow from clearing startup config during login-page bootstrap, which could leave the app stuck on the blinking Nash logo with only the referral card visible.
- **Safer auth boot:** Treat empty refresh responses on public auth routes as a stable signed-out state instead of redirecting the user back into the same login route loop.
- **Regression coverage:** Add a focused auth-context test so the no-session login path keeps rendering the actual sign-in UI.

title: v2.5.4
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Billing modal layout:** Tighten the pricing cards, compress the overage and usage copy, and widen the dialog so the upgrade CTA stays visible without scrolling on typical desktop screens.
- **Plan readability:** Reduce redundant plan bullets and shrink the Unlimited highlight block so the modal stays focused on choosing a plan instead of requiring a long read.

title: v2.5.3
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Chat stability and quieter logging:** Move resumable chat, query-param, and resume-on-load diagnostics behind the app logger so normal users are not flooded with console noise while chat recovery behavior stays easier to trace when logging is enabled.
- **File upload MIME matching:** Normalize wildcard MIME patterns like `type/*` before building regexes so document/file config rules match reliably without repeated invalid-pattern spam.
- **Referral and billing polish:** Move the referral CTA into the chat header, tighten when it appears during active conversations, clarify plan pricing/token allowances, and improve folder row click/keyboard behavior in the nav.

title: v2.5.2
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Audio playback disabled:** Remove the hidden `silence.mp3` autoplay iframe so the app no longer attempts browser audio playback on load.
- **Message TTS disabled:** Remove the chat message read-aloud control so assistant messages cannot trigger browser or external text-to-speech playback.
- **Auto-playback disabled:** Stop mounting stream-audio playback in the chat form so text-to-speech audio cannot auto-play during chat.

title: v2.5.1
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Temporary Chat memory safety:** Turning on Temporary Chat now forces the effective memory mode to `Off` in the chat UI instead of leaving the prior `Auto` selection visible.
- **Backboard request enforcement:** Temporary chats now send memory `off` through the Python streaming path, so request behavior matches the UI and avoids saving chat memory during temporary sessions.
- **Type safety:** Add the ephemeral-agent memory mode to the shared data-provider type so the Temporary Chat and memory toggle state stay aligned.

title: v2.5.0
body:
**Minor release**

- **Referrals and promo codes:** Add Backboard-backed referral codes, promo-code redemption, referral reward accounting, and admin promo management.
- **Pricing and billing:** Keep the existing tiers, add pay-as-you-go metered overage support after included monthly usage is exhausted, and expand Stripe checkout/webhook handling for overage items.
- **Account, login, and chat UI:** Add a referral panel in Settings/Account, a shortcut on the account card, and more prominent referral CTAs on the login and chat landing screens.
- **Credits foundation:** Replace the placeholder balance endpoint with a real token-credit balance and immutable ledger for promo and referral rewards.

title: v2.4.5
body:
**Bugfix release**

- **Google OAuth signup:** Fix Backboard user-memory creation in `create_user()` to handle dict-shaped `add_memory()` responses instead of assuming an object with `.id`.
- **Auth stability:** Prevent new social sign-ins from crashing after a successful Backboard `201 Created` when the user record is first persisted.

title: v2.4.4
body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Backboard web search:** Agent chat now forwards the selected model and `web_search=Auto` through the Python streaming path, so the Web Search toggle reaches Backboard instead of being ignored.
- **Safer fallback:** If a selected model rejects tool use, chat retries once without web search instead of failing the turn outright.
- **Git ignore cleanup:** Ignore nested Terraform lockfiles and `.terraform/` directories consistently in git.

**Hotfix release**

- **Release notes modal:** Footer version links now open an in-app release notes modal backed by the local release notes mirror for this private repo.
- **Sidebar layout:** Favorites now render directly in the main nav instead of inside the virtualized conversations list, keeping the chat list simpler and more stable.
- **Housekeeping:** Ignore local `.cursor/` files in git and refresh the Python lockfile entries already present for `gevent`.
title: v2.4.3

body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Memory panel:** Search now matches memory values using a contains threshold instead of ranking on both key and value, making memory lookup more predictable.
- **UI copy:** Continue the Agent to Persona terminology cleanup in `translation.json`.
  - `All Agents` -> `All Personas`
  - `Agent Marketplace` descriptions and placeholders -> Persona wording
  - `Agent Handoffs` -> `Persona Handoffs`
  - `Max Agent Steps` -> `Max Persona Steps`
  - `Agents` permissions/create/share/use labels -> Persona wording
  - `Create New Agent` -> `Create New Persona`
title: v2.4.2

body:
**Hotfix release**

- **Runtime:** Switch Docker gunicorn runtime from preload/gthread to **2 gevent workers** with worker connections for safer async/streaming behavior.
- **Build pipeline:** Fix `build.sh` ECR tagging/push path to use environment-specific repositories like `nash-dev`, `nash-test`, etc.
- **Dependencies:** Add `gevent` to `pyproject.toml` for the updated production worker class.
- **App startup:** Add a few extra Flask startup logs around route import/registration and SPA registration.
title: v2.4.1

body:
**Minor release**

**API**
- **Agent permissions:** `GET/PUT /api/permissions/agent/<id>` — read and update persona sharing (principals, public flag) stored in Backboard agent memory.
- **User:** User routes extended with `update_user_field`, chat data types, and Backboard-backed user memory handling.
- **Agents, files:** Route updates and fixes.
- **Misc:** Permissions endpoint returns real data for `resource_type=agent`.

**Client**
- **Account:** New `DangerZone.tsx` and `Nickname.tsx`; Account tab layout and copy updates.
- **Memories:** MemoryCard, MemoryCardActions, MemoryEditDialog simplified and aligned with API.
- **Personas:** AgentConfig cleanup; Marketplace and Landing copy tweaks.
- **Translations:** `en/translation.json` updates.

**Build**
- `build.sh`: small adjustments for deploy pipeline.
title: v2.4.0

body:
**Minor release**

- **Naming:** Rebrand "Agent" → "Persona" in the UI and config.
  - Sidebar/nav: "My Agents" → "Personas" (`alternateName` in data-provider config).
  - Marketplace: "Agent Marketplace" → "Persona Marketplace" (translation).
  - Builder: "Agent Builder" → "Persona Builder"; expand button aria-label "Open persona builder in modal".
title: v2.3.0

body:
**Bugfix release**

- **Chat / conversations / messages:** Use the user's **chat assistant** (`get_user_assistant_id`) instead of the config assistant for thread ownership, conversation listing, message search, and saving conversation meta (title, etc.). Fixes conversations and messages being tied to the wrong Backboard assistant.
- **Chat:** Use chat assistant when saving conversation meta after streaming; add memory debug logging for stream `add_message` calls.
- **Scripts:** Add `scripts/clear-stuck-documents.sh`, `scripts/probe-backboard-assistant-thread.sh`, `scripts/probe-backboard-streaming.sh` for Backboard debugging and cleanup.
title: v2.2.4

body:
**Bugfix release**

- **Chat:** Stream requests now pass `memory` to Backboard `add_message` using the ephemeral agent's memory setting (Auto → Auto, On → Readonly, Off → off).
- **Memories:** `create_memory` response correctly handles dict-shaped result (`id` / `memory_id`, `updated_at` / `created_at`) instead of assuming object attributes.
title: v2.2.2

body:
**Bugfix release**

- **Auth:** Refresh endpoint now checks for `sub` in JWT payload and returns empty token/user when missing instead of raising.
- **Messages:** New `GET /api/messages?search=...` — search messages across conversations by text content.
- **Dockerfile:** Drop explicit gunicorn `--workers`, `--threads`, `--timeout`, `--keep-alive`; use gunicorn defaults.
title: v2.2.1

body:
**Minor release**

**Terraform**
- Add `terraform/dev/` and `terraform/test/` environments (main.tf, variables, outputs, backend, tfvars).
- Root `variables.tf`: allow `environment = "test"` in addition to dev/staging/prod.
- App Runner module: SSM policy resource uses account ID and path `${app_name}/${environment}/*` instead of `var.ssm_secret_arns`.

**Config**
- `api/config.py`: Backboard, JWT, Google, Stripe env vars are required (no default empty string). App fails fast if misconfigured.

**Docker / runtime**
- Dockerfile: `COPY --chown=node:node` for frontend stage.
- Gunicorn: add `--preload`.

**API**
- `api/app.py`: basic logging (INFO) around app create, CORS, and `__main__`.

**Scripts**
- `scripts/start-docker-and-healthcheck.sh`: start Docker and run healthcheck.
title: v2.2.0

body:
Bugfix release

- **Dockerfile:** Remove `COPY .env.production .env` so production build no longer depends on a removed file.
- **Client:** Add workbox-build and workbox-window deps; lockfile updated.
title: v2.1.1

body:
# Nash v2.1.0

**Changes since v2.0.0** — minor release with a dedicated init flow, auth/agents/chat improvements, in-memory caching, and docs.

---

## Init flow (batch bootstrap)

- **New `/api/init` endpoint** — Replaces ~15 individual API calls on first page load. Fetches the user’s config-assistant memories once, partitions them by metadata type (conversations, thread mappings, agents, files, presets, prompt groups, favorites, tags, folders), and returns a single payload so the frontend can hydrate from one request.
- **Frontend Init module** — New `client/src/data-provider/Init/` with React Query hooks that call `/api/init` and expose the bootstrapped data for the app.
- **Root/Root.tsx** — Wires the init query into the app so the initial load uses the batch endpoint instead of many parallel Backboard calls.

## Backend

- **Auth (`api/routes/auth.py`)** — Expanded Google OAuth and JWT handling (92 lines added): refresh flow, error handling, and session behavior.
- **Agents (`api/routes/agents.py`)** — Richer agent CRUD and Backboard integration; background migration for agents missing `bb_assistant_id` so existing agents get a Backboard assistant when needed.
- **Chat (`api/routes/chat.py`)** — Streaming and conversation handling improvements (52 lines added).
- **Config routes (`api/routes/config_routes.py`)** — Small adjustments for compatibility with init and config-assistant usage.
- **Conversations (`api/routes/conversations.py`)** — Tweaks for conversation listing and structure.
- **Conversation service** — Uses init/cache where appropriate and stays consistent with the new init flow.
- **User service** — Updates for config-assistant lookup and user resolution used by init and auth.
- **Memory cache (`api/services/memory_cache.py`)** — New short-lived in-process cache for `get_memories(config_assistant_id)`. Multiple endpoints that previously each called Backboard now share one result within a 5s TTL; concurrent callers for the same assistant wait on the first fetch instead of issuing duplicate requests.
- **App/config** — App factory and config wiring for the new routes and services.

## Frontend

- **SocialButton** — Small fix for Google OAuth button behavior.
- **useResumableSSE** — Resumable SSE hook adjusted for stability.
- **Root** — Init query integration and loading/error handling for the bootstrap step.
- **data-provider** — New Init queries and exports; `api-endpoints` and `data-service` updated for the init endpoint.

## Docs and cleanup

- **README.md** — New project README: quick start, architecture diagram, features, tech stack, project layout, deployment (Docker, Terraform, App Runner).
- **docs/** — Added `logo-dark.svg` and `logo-light.svg` for light/dark README branding.
- **Removed** — `.env.production` and the NIPS PDF from the repo to avoid committed secrets and large binaries.

---

## Summary

| Area        | Change |
|------------|--------|
| **API**    | `/api/init` batch bootstrap; auth, agents, chat, config, conversations improvements; memory cache service |
| **Client** | Init data-provider and Root integration; SocialButton and SSE hook fixes |
| **Docs**   | README and logo assets; repo cleanup |

**Upgrade:** Pull `v2.1.0`, run `./start.sh` (or your usual deploy). No schema or config changes required beyond existing Backboard and env setup.
title: v2.1.0

body: Patch: init flow, auth/agents/chat fixes, memory cache, docs
title: v2.0.1

body:
- memory toggle in chat
- websearch pinned to chat
- monetized: 1 free (only OSS models, no memory) and 2 paid tiers (500k and 3mm tokens)
- agent builder pop out modal
- removed params from config drawer
- added free tier upsells over disabled config drawer options
- document ingest q/a working e2e
- thread/memory handling improvements
- more cache invalidation to keep instances in sync
- fixed tool calling
- fixed thread naming persistence
title: v1.1.0
